## Entities.Inventory.AnyInventoryEntryEntity type

Discriminated union of all inventory entry types. Use type guards to narrow to specific types.

**Signature:**

export type AnyInventoryEntryEntity = IMoldInventoryEntryEntity | IIngredientInventoryEntryEntity;
